news.summary: Bybit exchange has recovered its liquidity to pre-hack levels within 30 days of the February 2025 attack that drained $1.5 billion in funds. Bitcoin's 1% market depth has returned to around $13 million per day in March 2025. Altcoin liquidity on the exchange has rebounded to about 80% of pre-hack levels. The recovery has been slower for altcoins due to the risk-off market environment post-hack. Bybit's trading volumes are still in recovery, reflecting broader market trends amid ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty. The hack was caused by a compromised device from SafeWallet, the firm behind the wallet custody solution used by Bybit. CEO Ben Zhou assured investors that the exchange was solvent, and the industry came together to support Bybit post-hack. Other exchanges provided assistance and froze stolen funds.
news.headline: Bybit restores liquidity after $1.5B hack in February 2025; BTC liquidity at $13M/day. Altcoin levels rebounded to 80%. No shift in crypto security despite April hacks. CEO ensures solvency post-hack, industry support given. Cryptocurrency exchanges' fund handling scrutinized.

news.summary: A recent report on the construction market in Thailand predicts a 5.9% growth in real terms in 2025. This growth is attributed to investments in tourism and digital infrastructure, as well as an uptick in export activities. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, covers sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets up to 2029. This positive outlook underscores the potential for expansion and development within the Thai construction industry.
news.headline: Thailand construction industry output to grow by 5.9% in 2025, fueled by tourism, digital infrastructure investments.

news.summary: A report on the Portugal Construction Market, recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, projects the industry to see a 2.5% growth in 2025. This growth will be primarily driven by increased building permits and export activities. Additionally, investments in transport and energy projects are expected to contribute to this positive trend. The report provides detailed analysis by sector, including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets. The forecast covers trends and market size analysis up to 2029 (H1), offering valuable insights for stakeholders in the construction industry.
news.headline: Portugal's construction industry to grow by 2.5% in 2025, with an AAGR of 1.7% expected during 2026-2029.

news.summary: The news article highlights the recent rallies in the crypto market, with Bitcoin (BTC) reaching $97,000 (+3%), Ethereum (ETH) at $1,840 (+2%), and Solana (SOL) at $147 (+2%). Top gainers include Litecoin (LTC), Stacks (STX), WILD (WLD), Fetch.ai (FET), and Quant (QNT). BTC ETFs faced a decline of $86 million, while ETH ETFs dropped by $18 million. The market was buoyed by US-China trade talks, with BTC dominance surpassing 65%. New Hampshire became the first state to establish a crypto reserve, while the UK Treasury ruled out a BTC reserve. Thumzup planned to sell $500 million stock to buy BTC, while SOL Strategies purchased $18.25 million worth of SOL. Citi and SDX aimed to tokenize the pre-IPO market. Global stablecoin supply rose by 14% in 2025, Tether planned to introduce USDT on Kaia, and WLFI was set to airdrop stablecoin on the ETH mainnet. Michael Saylor expressed AI's intent to buy BTC, Bitwise applied for a NEAR ETF, Strike introduced BTC-backed lending, and Brian Armstrong's startup was valued at $810 million. CZ looked to apply for a pardon in the US, and Bhutan started accepting crypto payments for tourists. Bessent stated opposition to the Fed issuing a CBDC. FOMO HOUR podcast covers these and other significant topics daily, hosted by Farokh, Mando, and Tyler, streaming on YouTube and X from Monday to Friday. The article provides links for further information on the topics discussed and the hosts' social media profiles.

BTC ETFs - $86mn, ETH ETFs - $18mn. BTC dominance at 65%. New Hampshire pioneers crypto reserve. UK Treasury rejects BTC reserves. Thumzup to trade $500m stocks for BTC. SOL Strategies buys $18.25m SOL. Citi, SDX plan pre-IPO tokenisation. Global stablecoin supply up 14% in 2025. Tether to use USDT on Kaia. WLFI airdrops stablecoin on ETH. AI to invest in BTC: Saylor. Bitwise files NEAR ETF. Strike launches BTC-backed lending. Armstrong’s startup valued at $810m. CZ seeks pardon in the US. Bhutan adopts crypto for tourist payments. news.summary: Shares of Charles River Laboratories International Inc (NYSE: CRL) saw a surge in trading following the release of their impressive first-quarter 2025 earnings. The life science tools company reported revenue of $984.2 million, surpassing the expected $941.97 million by 2.7%. Despite a 2.7% decrease in revenue compared to the previous year, the company's operating margin dropped to 7.6% from 12.5%, attributed to lower revenue and increased amortization expenses. However, with adjustments, the operating margin rose to 19.1% from 18.5%, driven by cost-saving efforts from restructuring. Their adjusted EPS stood at $2.34, up from $2.27 in the previous year, beating the consensus estimate of $2.08. Specifically, revenue for the Research Models and Services (RMS) segment landed at $213.1 million, marking a 3.5% decrease year over year. The positive earnings report indicates a strong performance despite challenges, with more details available on financial news site Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Charles River Laboratories Q1 earnings beat consensus with revenue at $984.2 million, surpassing $941.97 million estimate. Stock rises on signs of demand stabilization, with adjusted EPS of $2.34 exceeding $2.08 estimate.

news.summary: Wisk Aero, a major player in Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) based in Mountain View, California, and a subsidiary of Boeing, has named Sebastien Vigneron as its new CEO. news.headline: Wisk Aero appoints Sebastien Vigneron as new CEO as Brian Yutko moves to Boeing leadership role.

news.summary: The Pectra upgrade for Ethereum (ETH) was implemented on May 7, following the Dencun fork last year. This significant development occurred at 6:05 a.m. ET, with finalization taking just over ten minutes. Notable changes introduced by Pectra include EIP-7702, revolutionizing how externally owned accounts (EOAs) engage with smart contracts. This enhancement permits regular user wallets to conduct contract logic while retaining their address, facilitating more intelligent and adaptable user accounts. EIP-7702 lays the groundwork for complete account abstraction, enabling users to bundle transactions, forego manual token permissions, and seamlessly interact across various applications. Moreover, EIP-7251 alters Ethereum's validator structure by raising the staking ceiling from 32 to 2,048 ETH per validator, accommodating larger stakers.
news.headline: Ethereum's Pectra upgrade goes live, including EIP-7702 to enhance user accounts. Staking cap raised to 2,048 ETH.

news.summary: Steven Madden Ltd (NASDAQ: SHOO) saw an increase in shares after reporting their first-quarter FY25 earnings. The company's revenue for the quarter grew by 0.2% year-on-year to $551.38 million, slightly below the analyst consensus of $557.34 million. Revenue from wholesale business went up 0.2% to $439.3 million, while Direct-to-Consumer revenue decreased by 0.2% to $112.1 million. The gross profit margin showed a 20 basis point increase from the previous year, reaching 40.9%. The operating margin was reported at 9.7%. For more detailed information, viewers can find the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Steve Madden's stock surges after reporting Q1 FY25 earnings with revenue at $551.38M, wholesale business up 0.2%, direct-to-consumer down 0.2%, and gross profit margin at 40.9%. Operating margin stands at 9.7%.(Media Source: Benzinga)

news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on AI Chips has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's publications. The Innovation Radar study focuses on AI hardware advancements, showcasing the impact of customized silicon and cutting-edge architectures on various sectors. The AI chip market is expected to soar to $154 billion by 2030, with an estimated compound annual growth rate of 20%. Major industry players such as AMD, Intel, Google, and Huawei are significantly contributing to the evolution of AI chip technology.
news.headline: Report analyzes how custom silicon and next-gen architectures are revolutionizing computing across industries, AI chip market to hit $154B by 2030 with 20% CAGR.
